_source: Captured from ErrorCategory.kt::classify and ErrorCategoryTest.kt. Classification is order-sensitive: HTTP/2 > connection-timed-out(NETWORK) > generic timeout > network > rate-limit > auth > ssl > storage > repository > UNKNOWN.

cases.message: error: RPC failed; curl 92 HTTP/2 stream 0 was not closed cleanly: PROTOCOL_ERROR
fatal: unable to access '...': HTTP/2 stream 1 was not closed cleanly
error: RPC failed; curl 56 GnuTLS recv error (-9): A TLS packet with unexpected length was received.
cases.note: curl 56 wins over TLS keyword via ordering

cases.message: curl 16 Error in the HTTP2 framing layer
fatal: unable to connect: connection timed out
cases.note: connection timed out is NETWORK, not TIMEOUT

cases.message: Unable to sync: timeout 10m
operation timed out

cases.note: false-positive guard: 'tls' in repo name must not trigger SSL_ERROR
